title: calea urticifolia var. axillaris
intro: Calea urticifolia var. axillaris, also known as Mexican Damiana, is a variety of the Calea urticifolia plant, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Calea urticifolia var. axillaris include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
